abstract: Velt Proxy Server implementation guide covering reverse-proxy (nginx) setup for all six Velt service hosts (CDN, API, persistence DB, ephemeral DB, storage, auth), the `proxyConfig` SDK configuration object, Content Security Policy (CSP) whitelisting, Subresource Integrity (SRI) hashes, and the `forceLongPolling` fallback for restricted network environments. Provides patterns for routing all Velt SDK traffic through customer-controlled infrastructure for enterprise network policies.
